title: トレーナー心得『指導は常に改良せよ』

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, next up is a dumbbell shoulder press to
build the deltoid—

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer <username>!
Nice to see you!
choice_data_list: Nice to see you too! Working on something?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh, was I speaking out loud? Sorry, haha...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking to change up Meek's training regimen
a little bit.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume's body is a mass of endless
potential. But if her training is unbalanced, the
risk of injury is high.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: And I absolutely do not want Meek to get injured.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Once I get back to my room, I'll carefully reread
the Kiryuin family's Trainer's Handbook for
insight.
choice_data_list:
I'd like to see this Trainer's Handbook
sometime!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Of course—self-discipline is one of the basics,
after all! We have to set a good example for our
trainees!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But as luck would have it, I never seem to get
bags under my eyes, no matter how late I stay up!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, I won't cause my trainee any
worry! So there's no need for you to worry about
me either!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I calm the overly enthusiastic Trainer Kiryuin
down, telling her that's not what I meant.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what's that?
You're interested in my family's teachings,
Trainer <username>?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I think your training methods are splendid enough
as is, really...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But hearing you say that certainly brightens my
day! I have one volume on me that I can lend you
right now.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and just to let you know... there are around
forty volumes in total. Shall I bring the rest of
them for you tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I've basically memorized them, so you can take
your time reading and return them at your leisure!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
After all, I read them over every night as part of
my bedtime routine! There's no way I'd forget
anything written in them!
